_comment: Fake mailbox for L2 pipeline dev. Threads map to seed matters via search_queries; a few carry fresh replies to prove the scan surfaces updates. me = jongha.kang@cheil.com.

messages.body: Sharing the original structure (Yashwanth/Saalim/Pratiksha, Cheil margin $7,424/mo).
Thanks Jongha. Samsung confirmed the traditional path. Can you send the revised structure reflecting that? We want to move this week.
We are holding invoices from April. Please send the SOW covering Apr through Dec so we can bill.
Gentle follow-up — any update on the SOW? This is now blocking several months of billing on our side.

threads.subject: Resources for SEA spoke to work from Chennai

messages.body: Attached PR lists and resumes for MuniReddy and Manikandan. Note peer authors appear due to pair programming.
Re-confirming R&R with Kranthi/Ramesh on candidate re-align.
Aligned on our end. Ready to set up the call with 김민규 whenever works.

threads.subject: EC standardization — MSA SDSI + TP study

messages.body: Sending the salary benchmarking sheet for the TP study.
Action required before first use: accept the OpenAI Enterprise terms in your account settings.

threads.subject: New PO request — Nendrasys additional resource

messages.body: Following up on the two approved resources — can we also discuss a PO for a third starting August? Woosuk suggested I reach out to you directly.
This week in Samsung news: new Galaxy launch, sustainability report...
